heading: Create a Connection to a Deployment
body:
For instructions on creating a connection to your
cluster using VS Code, see
[Connect to Your MongoDB Deployment](mongodb-vscode/connect)
in the MongoDB for VS Code documentation. If you copied your Atlas
connection string in the previous procedure, follow the steps to use
your Atlas connection string.

> **Tip:** The [Connect to Your MongoDB Deployment](mongodb-vscode/connect)
> page also provides information on disconnecting from a deployment
> and information on activating, renaming and removing a connection.
